test_completeness.justification: One client-side bug fix in the replay gate; unit-tested at the exact call site + a real-browser width-mismatch repro proves the user-facing outcome.

behaviors.behavior: onReplaySnapshot resizes the terminal to the snapshot's cols/rows BEFORE term.write when they differ (and only then), so the wide snapshot reconstructs faithfully in a narrow reader
behaviors.evidence: unit useReplayDrainGate.test.tsx: resize(120,30) called BEFORE write; no resize when dims already match; ignores 0-dims (3 tests PASSED). RED-without-fix by construction (asserts resize was called).

behaviors.behavior: end-to-end: a wide snapshot replayed into a narrow terminal keeps characters in order (no interleaving)
behaviors.evidence: E2E 93-replay-width-mismatch (real Chromium: wide echo SEQ token → navigate away → narrow viewport → navigate back → token contiguous after whitespace-strip) PASSED; 92-terminal-reflow-repaint no-regression PASSED

enumeration_basis.basis: one row per behavior: the gate's resize-before-write (unit) + the end-to-end no-interleave outcome (real-browser repro)

surface_verification.runner: BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3949 playwright test e2e/flows/93-replay-width-mismatch.spec.ts (+92 reflow regression) — isolated stack; v0-9-6/77 not run here (hardcoded dev-project id absent in temp home; they run in CI)
surface_verification.justification: Real-browser width-mismatch repro (wide→narrow re-attach) shows the token's chars stay in order; reflow-repaint regression green.
